version_description: Based on the acoustic live version. https://youtu.be/NDjK4GnwSRQ?si=UAAf2jOqQkE86ate.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                       [ch]Bbm[/ch]                                 [ch]Fm[/ch]
   He said, "Are you serious? I've tried, but I can't figure out[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Eb[/ch]                                      [ch]Db[/ch]
I've been next to you all night and still don't know what you're about[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bbm[/ch]                                [ch]Fm[/ch]
You keep t-t-talking, but not much coming out your mouth[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Eb6[/ch]
Can't you tell that I want you?"[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]Db[/ch]
I would want myself[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Baby, please believe me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Fm[/ch]
I'll put you through hell[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Eb6[/ch]
Just to know me, yeah-yeah[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Db[/ch]
So sure of yourself[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Baby, don't get greedy[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Fm[/ch]
That shit won't end well[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Eb6[/ch]
Oh ohh[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                     [ch]Bbm[/ch]                                      [ch]Fm[/ch]
   I see you eyeing me down, but you'll never know much past my name[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Eb[/ch]                                       [ch]Db[/ch]
Or how I'm running this room around and that I'm still half your age[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bbm[/ch]                                 [ch]Fm[/ch]
Yeah, you're l-l-l-looking at me like I'm some sweet escape[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]
Obvious that you want me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]Db[/ch]
I would want myself[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Baby, please believe me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Fm[/ch]
I'll put you through hell[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Eb6[/ch]
Just to know me, yeah-yeah[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Db[/ch]
So sure of yourself[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Baby, don't get greedy[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Fm[/ch]
That shit won't end well[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Eb6[/ch]
Oh ohh[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                        [ch]Bbm[/ch]                              [ch]Fm[/ch]
   He said, "I'm just curious, is this for real or just an act?[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Eb[/ch]                         [ch]Db[/ch]
Tell if you love or hate me, never met someone like that[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bbm[/ch]                             [ch]Fm[/ch]
Drive me so so so crazy, did you know you got that effect?"[/tab]
               N.C.
I said, "lemme check"


[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]Db[/ch]
I would want myself[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Baby, please believe me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Fm[/ch]
I'll put you through hell[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Eb6[/ch]
Just to know me, yeah-yeah[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Db[/ch]
So sure of yourself[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Baby, don't get greedy[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Fm[/ch]
That shit won't end well[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Eb6[/ch]
Oh ohhh[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                      [ch]Bbm[/ch]
I, I would want, want myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                      [ch]Eb6[/ch]
I, I would want, want myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                      [ch]Bbm[/ch]
I, I would want, want myself[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Eb6[/ch]
Oh oooh, oh ohhh[/tab]
